role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Acacia/Vachellia) and biome; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road infrastructure, poles, and markings; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on camera artifacts, building styles, and cross-domain synthesis; stayed within domain.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region and country. The meta agent played a decisive role by leveraging specific camera artifacts (stitching/halo blur) to distinguish Botswana from the visually similar Namibia, a sophisticated use of available data.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described arid soil, scrub, and flat terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately identified Acacia-like trees and xeric scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described wooden poles and road shoulders.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described building styles and camera artifacts.
